site.name: Furpathy

about.title: About Furpathy
about.body: Furpathy is a small publication about the everyday realities of sharing life with dogs and cats. We write long-form, research-backed pieces in four languages so people everywhere can find trustworthy answers.

footer.tagline: A quiet publication about life with dogs and cats.
